version_prefix.rationale: Optional 4-component ship-version prefix (vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH.MICRO). gstack workspace-aware /ship puts it at the front of PR titles / squash subjects as a landing-queue claim. Direct commits omit it; short version prefixes (v2, v1.2.3) stay banned via VERSION_IN_SUBJECT.

rules.message: feat with >50 lines must include a `Why:` body line.
rules.fix_hint: Add a body section starting with 'Why: <one-line reason>'. See spec for templates.

body_only.pattern: florian asked|as requested|per request|per my request
body_only.message: Don't attribute the commit to the operator/prompter; explain WHY the change is needed instead.
body_only.fix_hint: Replace 'florian asked me to fix X' with 'fix X because Y'.

body_only.pattern: addressed all|fix all|fixed all|cleaned up everything
body_only.message: Agent self-talk like 'addressed all comments' is empty; describe specific changes.
body_only.fix_hint: Replace with the specific issues fixed: 'fix N+1 in Foo.query, dedupe Bar.helper'.

subject_only.message: GitHub web-UI default subject; rewrite to describe the change.
subject_only.fix_hint: Use type(scope): subject format. Example: 'docs(readme): clarify install steps'.

subject_only.message: Short version prefixes (v2, v1.2.3) don't belong in commit subjects; let CHANGELOG do that. The 4-component ship-version prefix (v1.2.3.4) is allowed.
subject_only.fix_hint: Drop the short version prefix. Use 'chore(release): 1.2.3', or the 4-component 'v1.2.3.4 type: subject' form for a gstack /ship PR title.

Skill-Run.description: Which gstack skill triggered the commit (e.g., 'ship', 'investigate'). OMIT if not in a skill session — never fabricate.

Test-Suite.description: <pass>/<total> if test results known (e.g., '247/247'). OMIT if unknown.

Reviewed-By.description: codex|subagent|none if /review or /codex ran since last commit on this branch. OMIT if unknown.

Tool.description: claude-code|codex|conductor|cloud — tool that created the commit. OMIT if undetectable.

policy.fork_strip_rationale: Strip agent telemetry trailers when committing to a fork branch destined upstream. Different audience (upstream maintainer vs portfolio recruiter). Preserves Co-Authored-By and Tested.

override.valid_when: subject matches exemption pattern OR --no-verify used with this trailer

error_format.template:
BLOCK: <rule_id> <message>
FIX: <fix_hint>
SPEC: <spec_url>#<rule_id>
OFFENDING: <literal failing line>
error_format.rationale: Uniform across local hook + CI so agents have deterministic output to act on. Per DX D2.
